site.title: #1 TikTok Shop Health & Wellness Affiliate 2025 — $8M+ GMV | Hammad Media
site.description: TikTok Shop's #1 Health & Wellness affiliate for 2025. One creator, two accounts, $8M+ GMV. Send your supplement and I turn it into a bestseller.
site.statsUpdated: June 8, 2026 (YTD: Jan 1 – Jun 8, 2026, both accounts combined)

hero.headline: I turn supplements into bestsellers.
hero.subheadline: TikTok Shop's #1 Health & Wellness affiliate for 2025. Two accounts, $2.79M+ GMV this year — every video scripted, filmed, and posted by me. 105M+ product views and 113K+ units sold.

steps.title: Send me your product
steps.text: Ship a sample and set an affiliate commission on TikTok Shop. Supplements and wellness products are my specialty — it's where my audience already buys.

steps.title: I create the content
steps.text: I make every review video myself — strong openings, real demonstrations, honest opinions. The style that actually sells on TikTok Shop. No editors, no agencies, no middle layers.

steps.title: You verify every sale
steps.text: Content goes live across my accounts, and every attributed sale is verified in your own TikTok Shop Seller Center — not my slides. Full transparency.

partnership.heading: Ways to partner
partnership.sub: Three engagement models. Every one keeps me invested in your sales — pick the level of priority your launch deserves.

tiers.name: Boosted Commission
tiers.text: Set a higher commission rate for me on TikTok Shop and your product joins my testing lineup. You pay only when you get sales. No fixed number of videos — I post what performs, and higher rates get priority.

tiers.name: Retainer + Commission
tiers.text: A monthly fee guarantees a set number of review videos each month, posted across both accounts — plus commission on every sale. Month to month. No long-term contract.

tiers.name: Exclusive
tiers.text: One brand per product category. I never promote your competitors — your products get the entire category across both of my accounts. Retainer + commission + performance bonuses.

partnership.note: In every model, I earn the most when your product sells — my goals and your goals are the same. But one person means hard limits: I take on at most four new products each month. When a month is full, the next opening goes to the best fit. Supplement and wellness brands get first priority.

contact.heading: Work with me
contact.subheading: Tell me about your product — your TikTok Shop link, category, and the commission you have in mind. I reply to every brand inquiry within 24 hours, and the person who replies is the person who makes your videos.

items.q: How fast is the first video?
items.a: Fast. Once your sample arrives and the commission is set, the first video is typically live within **48 hours**. Retainer partners get a guaranteed number of videos every month.
You do — **one unit** to my studio address, shared after we connect. No bulk inventory, no warehousing, no purchase orders.
It depends on price point and margin.
bullets: Most products I take on run **20–35%** on TikTok Shop
Higher rates get priority in my content rotation
Performance bonuses move you to the top of the list for your category

items.a: **Yes to talking points, no to approval rounds.** Send me your key points and I will read every word. But I do not send drafts, and I do not reshoot based on notes — the video goes straight from my camera to my audience. This is not ego; it is the system. When brands edit videos, the videos start to feel like ads, and ads do not sell on TikTok Shop. Every number on this page came from working exactly this way.

On commission deals, your only risk is **one product sample**. I test different openings and styles — some products need three videos before one takes off. And if a product truly does not fit my audience, I will tell you directly instead of wasting your time.
Priced per video, agreed up front:
bullets: Month to month. No long-term contract.
items.tail: Smaller budget? Start with Boosted Commission — you pay only when you get sales.

items.q: How does the Exclusive tier work?
items.a: Exclusivity means I never promote your competitors.
bullets: **Category exclusivity** — retainer + commission + performance bonuses, priced case by case
Example: lock collagen, and only your collagen ever appears on my accounts
**Complete health & wellness exclusivity** — from **$50,000 per month**
Month to month. One brand per category — once a category is taken, it is closed.

legal.disclaimer: Brand names and product images appear solely to document affiliate sales history and do not imply sponsorship or endorsement. All trademarks are the property of their respective owners.
legal.privacy: Privacy: inquiries submitted through this form are delivered to my inbox and used only to respond to you. This site sets no cookies and runs no trackers. Your information is never sold or added to a marketing list.

receipts.sub: Six products. $1.1M in attributed sales. Five months. Every top video is linked — check the views yourself, and I'll walk you through the sales dashboards on our first call.
